Subject: AURORA Version 6.0 release information
Message:
EPIS is proud to announce to release of AURORA version 6.0  ---  This
version of AURORA not only boasts the most capable and agile Electric
Market Price Forecasting model in the market, but also the best, most
current pre-formatted database available...  Included for the same
price.

Please contact me for additional information.
